---
title: "Constance Frederica Gordon Cumming"
---

## Constance Frederica Gordon Cumming

**Dates:** (1837-1924)

### Description

travel writer, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1882-91)

### Biography

Fifth dau of Sir William Gordon Cumming 2nd Bt. (1787-1854) and Eliza Campbell (d. 1842). [PB; Harvard Lib Cat]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 19th [1885]
- Letter from Feb 17th [1885] 
- Letter from May 5th [1884] 
- Letter from Sept 8th [?1880-1888]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
